subcodes.first_line: Know thou that the Bird hath indeed taken flight from the branch of Iraq, by reason of what the hands of the oppressors have wrought. Yet by My Name, the Cause endureth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم بان الطیر قد طارت عن غصن العراق بما اکتسبت ایدی الظالمین ولکن امر بقسمی
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
